$curated: Per-state BODY node set for study-session — the keyed body nodes the FE renders in each state (appbar / screen / progress / close / options chrome excluded, matching review.states.json). The only state-differentiating MxCard node is study-session/card: present ONLY in NewLearn stage-1 (the learn pass, study_session_screen.dart:135), absent in every game stage (2–5, owned by the W5 game widgets game-*) and in due-review (RecallGame — the kit's due-review card is game-recall's, not study-session/card). Curated from study-session.states.skeleton.json (gen_states.mjs). Cross-checked by study_session_parity_test.dart, which drives stage1-review (card present, 0 grades), stage2-matching (card absent, 1 grade → MatchingGame) and due-review (card absent, RecallGame). stage3-choice / stage4-recall / stage5-typing are listed here (card absent, []) for completeness but not driven — the same card-absent gate as stage2, so they are documented-not-driven coverage gaps (like review's editing/audio). NOT listed at all (dropped): relearn (re-queue not keyed at study-session scope), exit (overlay non-MxCard — Template A does not gate it; exit-cancel/exit-ok are non-MxCard), resume-error + answer-save-error (do not exist in v1 — see intent-ledger exceptions resume/save-error).
